title: Lesson 1271: 明朗, 目方, 恵み...

items.gloss: cheerful; bright; clear; clean; honest; fair
to bless; to show mercy to; to give (money, etc.)
remarkable; striking; brilliant; splendid; spectacular; wonderful
to wake up; to awake; to awaken to (instinct, ability, perception, etc.); to become aware of; to become conscious of; to realize; to come to one's senses

to call; to invite; to send for; to summon; to eat; to drink; to put on; to wear; to ride; to catch (a cold); to take (a bath); to tickle (one's fancy); to put on (years); to commit (seppuku); to do; used to show respect
